scripts.test: npm run test:cake && npm run test:class && npm run test:reviews && npm run test:admin-reviews && npm run test:review-messages && npm run test:review-page && npm run test:review-photo-client && npm run test:review-coupon-client && npm run test:review-schema && npm run test:review-api && npm run test:review-api-deploy && npm run test:manual-coupon && npm run test:admin-calendar && npm run test:admin-reservation && npm run test:csv-security && npm run test:calendar-access && npm run test:reservation-api && npm run test:reservation-api-deploy
scripts.test:review-coupon-client: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-review-coupon-client-test-$(date +%s); VITE_MARKET=AU npx tsc tests/review-coupon-client.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && VITE_MARKET=AU node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/review-coupon-client.test.js && node --test tests/review-coupon-component.test.mjs
scripts.test:reviews: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-reviews-test-$(date +%s); npx tsc tests/reviews.test.ts tests/public-reviews.test.ts tests/public-review-dialog.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/reviews.test.js $TMP_DIR/tests/public-reviews.test.js $TMP_DIR/tests/public-review-dialog.test.js && node --test tests/public-reviews-component.test.mjs
scripts.test:admin-reviews: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-admin-reviews-test-$(date +%s); npx tsc tests/admin-reviews.test.ts tests/admin-review-photo-preview.test.ts tests/admin-review-reward-client.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/admin-reviews.test.js $TMP_DIR/tests/admin-review-photo-preview.test.js $TMP_DIR/tests/admin-review-reward-client.test.js && node --test tests/admin-reviews-component.test.mjs tests/admin-review-reward-component.test.mjs tests/admin-photo-preview-api.test.mjs
scripts.test:review-page: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-review-page-test-$(date +%s); npx tsc tests/review-page.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/review-page.test.js && node --test tests/review-isolation.test.mjs
